name: Brie Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Cover pie crust with foil and bake for 10 minutes.
3. Remove foil and bake for an additional 5 minutes.
4. Remove pie crust from the oven and reduce heat to 325°F.
5. Julienne the ham. Chop all of the green onions.
6. In a skillet, sauté the ham until browned. Remove and set aside.
7. Sauté the onions until tender. Remove with a slotted spoon and combine with the ham.
8. Spread the mixture over the bottom of the pie shell.
9. Spread Brie over the ham mixture and sprinkle with Parmesan.
10. In a bowl, combine eggs, cream, and nutmeg.
11. Pour the egg mixture over the cheese.
12. Bake for 30 minutes or until set.
13. Let cool slightly, then cut into wedges and serve.
